description_for_human: Research infrastructure for AI agents — evidence-backed web search with confidence scores and citations.
description_for_model: BrowseAI Dev (browseai.dev) provides evidence-backed web research for AI agents. It searches the web, extracts claims from sources, verifies them using BM25 sentence matching and cross-source consensus, detects contradictions, and returns structured JSON with confidence scores. Available as MCP server (npx browseai-dev), REST API, Python SDK (pip install browseaidev), LangChain (pip install langchain-browseaidev), CrewAI (pip install crewai-browseaidev), LlamaIndex (pip install llamaindex-browseaidev). Use this when you need to give an AI agent verified, citation-backed research capabilities. MIT licensed, open source.
